tasks.title: Unit tests for every query_execute outcome envelope
tasks.description:
internal/server/query_execute_test.go (new). Build a test harness that registers query_execute against a fake mcp.Server + fake runtime.Manager with one Entry whose Cache/PQ/Client are injectable. Drive the handler closure directly via the registered tool's Handler func. Assert envelope shape + recorded gate evidence + metric counters per outcome:
 - invalid_query: ValidateQuery returns errors
 - cost_exceeded: complexity > cost ceiling
 - budget_exceeded: pre-fill gate write counter to max
 - unknown_server: missing server name + multi-server manager
 - permission_denied: read-only identity in ctx
 - permission_denied_server: clients.yml scope rejects server
 - auth_expired: fake upstream returns 401
 - upstream_error: fake upstream returns 500
 - rate_limited: rate-limit transport rejects
 - pq_not_found: hash with no registered entry
 - pq_conflict: both query + hash set
 - ok_cached: pre-populate entry.Cache
 - ok: full success path
Lifts internal/server coverage from 33% toward 60%.

tasks.title: Unit tests for schema_search / schema_get / query_validate / query_cost / schema_diff
tasks.description:
internal/server/schema_tools_test.go (new). Same direct-handler-invocation pattern as v05-server-query-execute-coverage. Cover:
 - schema_search: empty results, populated results, subgraph column rendering on/off
 - schema_get: hit, ErrNotFound envelope
 - query_validate: ok + errors
 - query_cost: ok + errors propagated
 - schema_diff: no-diff (no_diff envelope), populated diff
 - resolveServer: single-server default, multi-server no name, multi-server known name, multi-server unknown name

tasks.title: End-to-end mutation integration via httptest fake
tasks.description:
internal/server/mutation_test.go (new). Boot a httptest server that:
 - serves a minimal introspection response so refreshEntry succeeds
 - on POST: parse the query, if it's `mutation Inc { increment }` increment an atomic counter + return {data:{increment:N}}
 - otherwise return {data: null}
Then exercise: build a Manager pointing at it; register tools; call query_execute via the handler closure with a mutation query; assert:
 - the fake's counter incremented exactly once
 - cache bypass: a second identical mutation call also hits the fake (counter=2)
 - gate write budget: with MaxWritesPerSession=1, the second call returns budget_exceeded + counter STAYS at 1 (gate rejects before upstream)
 - audit chain: g.Chain(session)[0].Effect == "write" + Outcome == "ok"
 - docs comment lists the public GraphQL endpoints checked (countries, swapi, pokeapi) + why none support live mutation smoke (read-only); a docker-compose-based local Hasura is the future path for a live mutation tag.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG sweep + tag v0.5.0
tasks.description: Promote Unreleased → ## 0.5.0 - YYYY-MM-DD. Note coverage delta (server: 33% → X%). Document the mutation testing approach + the public-endpoint findings. `make verify && go test -tags=live,stdio_smoke ./...` clean. Tag v0.5.0 + push. Brew tap should auto-bump (HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN now wired since v0.4.1).

tasks.title: Adopt mcp-go ToolFilter when #92 ships
tasks.description: Watch mcp-go #92 throughout v0.3 cycle. On merge + release: bump dep, replace internal/server/tool_filter.go with `mcp.WithMiddleware(mcp.ToolFilter(mayList))` one-liner, delete the wrapper + tool_filter_test.go (replaced by mcp-go's coverage). If unmerged at freeze: skip, document, file follow-up. Bonus stretch: open mcp-go ResourceFilter + PromptFilter PRs.

tasks.title: Docker + systemd + Kubernetes deployment artefacts
tasks.description: Three new files: docs/deployment/docker.md + Dockerfile (multi-stage, distroless final, non-root UID, ENTRYPOINT scry serve); docs/deployment/systemd.md + scry.service template with PrivateTmp/ProtectSystem=strict/NoNewPrivileges/ReadWritePaths-pin-to-audit-dir; docs/deployment/kubernetes.md + manifests/k8s/{deployment,configmap,secret,service,hpa}.yaml with readiness probe = `scry doctor`, resource limits, run-as non-root, fsGroup for audit volume. Smoke: docker build succeeds, image runs `scry version`. k8s manifests apply on kind cluster.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG sweep + tag v0.2.0
tasks.description: Move every v0.2 commit from CHANGELOG.md `Unreleased` into a `## 0.2.0 - YYYY-MM-DD` section grouped by Added/Changed/Fixed/Security. Update README badges if version-pinned. Confirm `make verify && go test -tags=live,stdio_smoke ./...` clean. Tag v0.2.0 + push. Release workflow publishes; if HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN now in repo secrets, the brew formula bump fires too.

tasks.title: Schema diff alerts + schema_diff MCP tool
tasks.description: internal/schema/diff.go: compare two *Schema instances, return added/removed/changed type names with a kind flag (additive vs breaking). runtime.refreshEntry calls Diff() against the previous SDL, persists last-N diffs in meta, emits log + metric `scry.schema.changes_total{kind}`. New MCP tool schema_diff(server, limit) returns the last N diffs. Tests: identical schemas → empty diff; added field → additive; removed field → breaking; changed required arg → breaking.

tasks.title: Wire cache hit/miss counters into query_execute
tasks.description: Add ScryMeters.CacheHits + ScryMeters.CacheMisses Int64Counter, dimensioned by server label. Increment from query_execute right after cache.Get returns hit/miss (only for effect=read; mutations don't touch cache). Test: hit/miss recorded with correct outcome + server attribute. Update README observability section to list the new metrics.

tasks.title: keychain:// token-ref via 99designs/keyring
tasks.description: Add ResolveToken case for keychain://service.account refs. Use 99designs/keyring (cross-platform: macOS Keychain, libsecret, Windows DPAPI). On keyring-unavailable error: return clear hint pointing operator to file:// fallback. Tests: parse keychain:// ref, mock keyring backend with table-driven cases, headless fallback path emits actionable error.

tasks.title: Adopt mcp-go ToolFilter once #90 ships (or upstream the PR)
tasks.description: Check status of mcp-go #90 weekly through v0.2 cycle. If merged + released: bump dep, swap internal/server/tool_filter.go for the upstream-provided `mcp.ToolFilter(predicate) Middleware`, delete the wrapper. If still open at v0.2 freeze: open a PR against mcp-go ourselves with the internal/server/tool_filter.go implementation refactored to use typed handler internals. Acceptance: scry doesn't ship its own tool-list filter middleware by v0.2.0.

tasks.title: TTL query result cache
tasks.description: internal/cache package with TTL-bounded Get/Set per upstream entry. Key = SHA-256(query|variables|operationName). Wired into query_execute: bypass for effect=write, otherwise check cache before upstream call. On hit: recordOutcome("ok_cached", ...), gate.Record with outcome=ok_cached so chain stays accurate, return cached body. On miss: run upstream + Set on success. Operator knobs: --cache-ttl (default 30s, 0 disables), --cache-max-entries (default 1000). Metric: `scry.cache.{hits,misses}_total{server}`. Tests: TTL expiry, mutation bypass, max-entries LRU eviction, hit + miss metrics, audit chain contains cached entries.

tasks.title: Emit each Evidence record as an OTel log
tasks.description: internal/obs/audit.go: thin wrapper that converts an Evidence record to an OTel LogRecord (timestamp, body=summary, attrs={server, effect, complexity, outcome, query_hash, response_hash, chain_hash, session}). Init in cmd/scry/main.go alongside tracer + meter; honour OTEL_LOGS_EXPORTER (none|otlp|stdout). Gate.Record gains a single Emit() call after the existing append path so JSONL stays the durable local copy. Tests: stdout exporter renders each record; no-op provider absorbs silently; redaction — no raw query/response bodies in attrs (hashes only).

tasks.title: Detect Apollo federated upstreams + tag subgraphs in search
tasks.description: 1) schema.IntrospectFederation(): probe `{ _service { sdl } }` after the normal introspection; on success, parse the returned SDL with @key/@external directive awareness. 2) schema.SearchUnit gains a Subgraph string field. 3) runtime.refreshEntry calls federation probe; populates Subgraph on each unit when present. 4) renderSearchResults shows subgraph in markdown table. 5) Test: stub upstream returning federated SDL → units carry subgraph; non-federated upstream → Subgraph empty (no regression).

tasks.title: mTLS subject CN → MCP Identity middleware
tasks.description: 1) internal/server/mtls_identity.go: HTTP middleware that reads req.TLS.PeerCertificates[0]. If non-empty: build Identity{ID: subjectCN, Name: subjectCN}, store via mcp.ContextWithIdentity. 2) buildServeOpts wires this middleware BEFORE BearerAuth so mTLS identity takes precedence when both are presented. 3) Tests: synthesised request with PeerCertificates → identity in context matches CN; no cert → middleware no-ops, BearerAuth proceeds; both cert + bearer → cert wins.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG sweep + tag v0.4.0
tasks.description: Move v0.4 work from Unreleased into dated section. Added/Changed groups. README badge updates if version-pinned. `make verify && go test -tags=live,stdio_smoke ./...` clean. Tag v0.4.0 + push. Release workflow auto-publishes via goreleaser.

tasks.title: scry doctor diagnostic CLI
tasks.description: New subcommand `scry doctor`. Probes per server: upstream reachability (HEAD or empty POST), introspection mode (cached meta), auth status (reuses StatusAll), audit-dir perms (0700 + per-file 0600), OTel exporter connectivity when OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER set, scope sanity check (clients.yml validates). One-line verdict per check, color-coded console. Exit code = sum of failed checks. Tests: each probe has its own unit test against a stub state; integration test runs `doctor` against a healthy fixture and asserts exit 0 + against a broken fixture and asserts non-zero.

tasks.title: Fuzz harness for ParseSDL, gate.Classify, cache.Key
tasks.description: Three FuzzXxx funcs in their respective packages: FuzzParseSDL (random bytes → ParseSDL must not panic), FuzzClassify (random strings → Classify always returns one of three Effects), FuzzCacheKey (random inputs → Key is deterministic + collision-free for distinct inputs). Build-tagged via go test -fuzz pattern. Nightly CI workflow (.github/workflows/fuzz.yml) runs each for 5min. Crashers go into testdata/fuzz/<func>/.

tasks.title: Audit JSONL size-based rotation with chain continuity
tasks.description: Add --audit-max-size (50MiB default) + --audit-keep (5 default). On rollover: rename <session>.jsonl→<session>.jsonl.1, shift older suffixes, open new .jsonl. Critical: chain hash continuity across files — first record of new file uses last record's ChainHash of .jsonl.1 as prev. VerifyChain must verify across the whole sequence. Tests: rollover triggers at threshold, chain verifies end-to-end across 5+ rotations, keep-N truncates oldest.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG sweep + tag v0.3.0
tasks.description: Promote Unreleased into ## 0.3.0 section. Add/Changed/Fixed groups. README badge updates if version-pinned. Final `make verify && go test -tags=live,stdio_smoke ./...`. Tag v0.3.0 + push. Release workflow auto-publishes; if HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN now in repo secrets, brew formula bumps too.

tasks.title: Wire fortify rate limiter per server
tasks.description: Add rate_limit.rps + rate_limit.burst to servers.yml. Layer fortify's rate-limit middleware onto upstream.Client.http chain. On reject, surface structured rate_limited envelope with retry_after. Tests: under-limit passes, over-limit rejects with correct envelope, per-server isolation (one upstream throttled doesn't affect another).

tasks.title: Persisted query storage + CLI + tool integration
tasks.description: 1) internal/pq package: per-server hash→query Store backed by SQLite (reuse schema.Store DB; add `pq` table). Get(hash), Put(name, query), Delete(hashOrName), List(). 2) cmd/scry/pq.go: subcommand wiring `scry pq add/list/remove <server>`. 3) internal/server/query_tools.go: ExecuteInput gains `Hash` string; mutually exclusive with `Query`. On hash: pq.Get → forward as query. Audit chain records both hash + query_hash (so external auditors can correlate). 4) Tests: roundtrip via CLI, hash lookup in execute, missing hash returns pq_not_found envelope, conflict (both args) rejected.

tasks.title: Custom auth header + scheme per server
tasks.description: Add auth.header_name + auth.scheme to auth.Server (servers.yml) + Client (clients.yml). Thread through upstream.Client.SetAuth so hot reload swaps without restart. Empty scheme = no prefix. Tests: bearer (default), X-API-Key (no scheme), Token <T> (custom scheme), refresh-on-reload.

tasks.title: Race-stress harness for hot-reload + Gate concurrency
tasks.description: Build-tagged (`stress`) test under internal/server/. Spawn N concurrent goroutines: half issuing query_execute against fakeUpstream, quarter rewriting servers.yml to trigger Replace(), quarter calling g.Record on shared session. Run for 30s; -race must report 0 races + 0 fatals. CI workflow: nightly job (cron) that runs the stress tag; not blocking on PR.

tasks.title: Audit chain anchor sidecar closes truncation gap
tasks.description: Write <session>.anchor next to the JSONL files holding the ChainHash of the oldest-still-retained record. On rotation truncation, refresh the anchor to point at the new oldest record. On load, read the anchor and use it as the initial prev-hash so VerifyChain succeeds end-to-end even after archives drop. Tests: keep=3 truncate-then-verify case from v0.2's TestAuditRotationKeepTruncatesAndDocumentsBoundary now passes cleanly; anchor file 0600 perms; missing anchor falls back to current behaviour (genesis prev="").
